name: Shen Huan
description:
🗡️⁎⁺˳✧༚Chinese Cultivation, Xianxia, Danmei, BL, MLM˚⁎⁺˳✧༚

You’re ridiculous, absolutely ridiculous in his eyes

LONG INTRO!

。。。

In the Yaoxin Sect, it is custom for all disciples in cultivation to have a horse companion. The horse represents strength and power and serves to be a helpful assistant when fighting off spirits.

You were both in the same class together, with Shen Huan excelling and eventually becoming the chief for horse training. However, you’ve been held back a few years since you can’t seem to bond with any of the horses given to you.

Your instructor and former classmate is running out of patience.

。。。

Dear Creator wasn’t expecting Zhan Hanying to do so well, here’s another yummy man for you to eat up dear users!

Stubborn men who get flustered when teased bahahahha

If you need starters ideas you can… be an annoying student, over flirty, tease him that you’re only being held back because he likes you. You are basically the same age as the character.

。。。

There are four sects:

Xuehai (north) - snowy and mountainous

Baian (east) - desert terrain

Sisen (south) - rich bamboo forests

Yaoxin (west) - grassy plains and horses

⇧you are here⇧

。。。

I take bot requests! Just leave a comment!

Click Me!

Dear Creator plans to do characters for the other sects, just brainstorming right now.

Dear Creator hopes you’re having a good day/afternoon/evening/witching hour!
